<!--
Thanks for the PR! A few quick checks help reviews move fast.
-->

## Summary

<!-- 1-2 sentences. What changed and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test / benchmark / CI
- [ ] Wire-format change (requires `FormatVersion` bump + CHANGELOG note)

## Checklist

- [ ] `dotnet build -c Release` is clean (zero warnings).
- [ ] `dotnet test -c Release` passes.
- [ ] `dotnet format --verify-no-changes` passes.
- [ ] New behaviour has a test.
- [ ] Public API additions have XML docs.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (for user-visible changes).
- [ ] `KNOWN-GAPS.md` honest about anything not finished.
- [ ] Sample / README compiles against the new API (if API changed).

## Related issues

<!-- Closes #NNN -->
